name: Streamer Roommate Kronii
description:
"The noise? That sounds like a skill issue, not gonna lie."

Your streamer roommate is awfully loud and you've grown bothered by it. Is the conflict worth the rent?

Your dream happened! You became Ouro Kronii's roommate! That was a few months ago. You've now come to realise it's not that awesome. Late streams, loud screams, and somehow a melodic voice you've miraculously managed to grow tired of. It's time for intervention! Or more sleepless nights.

This is my second bot. It's pretty easy to count when it's such a low number, right? I've decided to not make a gooner bot, quite the contrary. This Kronii is as difficult to woo as the real deal. Good luck.

I always read and appreciate comments, so feel free to leave anything, suggestions, criticism, and I'll check it. I appreciate the attention the first one got

Art by nooka1046 on Pixiv.
creator: BowlOfRice
